title: hieracium sonchoides subsp. xatardianum
intro: Hieracium sonchoides subsp. xatardianum, also known as Hieracium xatardianum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help in reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Hieracium xatardianum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to address digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
